<style>

@media only screen and (min-width: 992px) {
.hero__content p {
  width: 25vw;
}
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 3000px) {

.wrapper--full {
max-width: 3000px;}
}
.hero__content h1 {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 40px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: #fbfbfb;
  padding: 0px 0px;
}
.hero__content p {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-weight: 400;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  color: rgba(251, 251, 251, 0.8);
  padding: 0px 0px;
  letter-spacing: 0.2em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
</style>
<script>
  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    // Select the color selector fieldset
    const colorFieldset = document.querySelector(".radio__fieldset--swatches");
    if (!colorFieldset) return;

    // Find all visible radio swatches inside it
    const swatches = colorFieldset.querySelectorAll("radio-swatch");

    // If 0 or 1 swatches, hide the color selector fieldset
    if (swatches.length <= 1) {
      colorFieldset.style.display = "none";
    }
  });
</script>

section_rich_text_ttUfgk.name: Rich text

settings.code: {{ collection.description }}

Half tights give light compression, zero flap, and pocket securityâ€”great for speed work and tournament day. Split shorts maximize airflow and freedom of movement, ideal for hot weather and long runs. If you train in heat or want the breeziest feel, go splits; if you want support and a locked-in fit, go golf posters.

Skimming, not tight. Armholes shouldnâ€™t rub; the hem should sit near the hips so it wonâ€™t bunch. For racing, choose true-to-measurement; for relaxed training, consider one size up.

2â€“3" = race feel & max mobility. 4â€“5" = everyday training balance. 6â€“7" = more coverage/cooler weather. If youâ€™re between lengths, pick the shorter for range of motion, longer for modesty/versatility.

Look for lightweight, moisture-wicking poly/nylon blends (~90â€“120gsm) with mesh zones for ventilation. For tights, add elastane for 4-way stretch and recovery. Avoid heavy cotton for anything beyond easy jogsâ€”it traps moisture and chafes.

Use waist/hip for bottoms and chest for tops. If youâ€™re between sizes: choose your measured size for a compressive half-tight fit; consider sizing up for relaxed shorts/shirts. Golf gear ships within 5 business days and typically arrives in 3â€“4 business days after shipping. Returns accepted within 30 days if items are unworn with original tags/packaging.

• Golf Posters
  • Golf Posters
  • Golf Posters
  • Golf Shirts
  • Graphic Shirts
  • Hoodies
  • Posters
  • Stickers

<style>

.product-item__image {
  position: relative;
}

/* Apply grayscale ONLY when sold out */
.product-item--sold-out .product-item__bg,
.product-item--sold-out .product-item__bg__inner img,
.product-item--sold-out .product-item__bg img {
  filter: grayscale(100%);
  -webkit-filter: grayscale(100%);
  opacity: .9; /* optional: adds a subtle 'dimmed' sold-out feel */
}

.product-information {
    border: 2px solid black;
}

.product-item__bg {
border: 3px solid black;
border-bottom: 0px solid black;
}


.product-item__sold-out-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  pointer-events: none;
  z-index: 2;

  /* Typography */
  text-transform: uppercase !important;
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  letter-spacing: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE) !important;
  font-size: 28px;
  font-weight: 800 !important;

background-color: rgba(0, 123, 255, 0.5);
border: 2px black solid;
border-bottom: 0px black solid;
}

/* 4:5 aspect ratio container (forces oval shape to scale correctly) */
.product-item__sold-out-overlay::before {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  aspect-ratio: 4 / 5;
  margin: auto;
}


.product-item__sold-out-overlay span {
  color: #ffffff;
  font-weight: 1000;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}





/* Golf Print Club â€“ hide the fake style row when there is only 1 swatch */
.selector-wrapper[data-option-position="1"]:has(.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] radio-swatch:first-of-type):not(:has(.radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] radio-swatch:nth-of-type(2))) {
  display: none !important;
}

font-weight: 100;

border-left: 2px black solid;

/* Force the option blocks (color + size) to stack vertically */
.product__selectors .selector-wrapper {
  display: flex !important;
  flex-direction: column !important;
  align-items: center !important;
  width: 100%;
}

/* Center the COLOR swatches row */
.product__selectors .radio__fieldset--swatches .radio__buttons[data-variant-buttons] {
  display: flex !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  width: 100%;
}

/* Center the SIZE buttons row */
.product__selectors .selector-wrapper[data-option-position] .radio__buttons:not(.radio__fieldset--swatches) {
  display: flex !important;
  justify-content: center !important;
  width: 100%;
}

/* Center the labels above each group */

.product__selectors .radio__legend {

padding-bottom:16px;

<style>
/* GOLF PRINT CLUB - MAIN RUNNING COLLECTION */

/* ---------- RESETS / GLOBALS ---------- */
.rc-section {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 3000px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 60px 5vw;
  box-sizing: border-box;
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);
  color: #fff;
}
.rc-section * { box-sizing: border-box; }

/* ---------- HERO ---------- */
.rc-hero {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 70vh;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center center;
  background-repeat: no-repeat;
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  padding: 60px 5vw;
  max-width: 3000px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.rc-hero::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.65) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 50%, rgba(0,0,0,0) 100%);
  pointer-events: none;
}
.rc-hero__content {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  max-width: 600px;
}
.rc-hero__subtitle {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
  font-family: var(--BTN-FONT-STACK);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 3px;
  color: #1B5E20;
  margin: 0 0 12px 0;
}
.rc-hero__title {
  font-size: clamp(42px, 6vw, 80px);

}
.rc-hero__desc {
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 400;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
  margin: 0;
  max-width: 440px;
}

/* ---------- TRUST STRIP ---------- */
.rc-trust {

}

  justify-content: center;

  margin: 0 auto;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.rc-trust__item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;

}

/* ---------- SHOP BY CATEGORY ---------- */
.rc-categories {
  background: #111;
}
.rc-categories__heading {
  font-size: clamp(24px, 3vw, 36px);
  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);

  font-style: var(--BTN-FONT-STYLE);

}
.rc-categories__scroll {
  display: flex;
  gap: 16px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  padding-bottom: 8px;
  scrollbar-width: none;
}
.rc-categories__scroll::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
.rc-categories__card {
  flex: 0 0 calc(20% - 13px);
  min-width: 200px;
  scroll-snap-align: start;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: #fff;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  background: #1a1a1a;
  border-radius: 6px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: transform 0.25s ease;
}
.rc-categories__card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
.rc-categories__img {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 4/3;
  background: #222;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;

}

}

  font-size: 15px;

}
.rc-categories__count {

}

  font-weight: var(--BTN-FONT-WEIGHT);
}

/* ---------- EDUCATION (WHY RUNNERS) ---------- */
.rc-education {

.rc-education__heading {

  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;

}
.rc-education__row:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.rc-education__row--reverse .rc-education__image { order: 2; }
.rc-education__row--reverse .rc-education__text { order: 1; }
.rc-education__image {
  width: 100%;

.rc-education__title {

.rc-sizeguide {

.rc-sizeguide__grid {

  color: #fff;

/* ---------- MOBILE ---------- */
@media (max-width: 767px) {

    display: grid;

    gap: 16px 24px;
    justify-items: start;

  .rc-education__row--reverse .rc-education__image { order: 0; }
  .rc-education__row--reverse .rc-education__text { order: 0; }

  .rc-sizeguide__grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }

  .rc-guarantee__items { gap: 32px; }
